consensus: Decision quality in termination payroll depends on controls, not urgency.
Explicit verdict rules reduce ad hoc in-cycle risk.
Contested components should follow controlled exception paths.
uncertainties: City-level evidence standards vary by case facts.
Some component treatment details need local confirmation.
English-language summaries may miss Chinese-language implementation nuances.
practical_implication_for_foreign_employ: Use myth-based decision verdicts with control-confidence scoring before approving in-cycle payouts.
